Architecture Overview"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"BEAM (Biological-inspired Episodic-Associative Memory) is the core architecture powering Mnemosyne. It models human memory organization with four distinct tiers, each optimized for different retention and retrieval patterns."}],"\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22"],["$L23"],"$L24"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@25"]},null,false,"$@25"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L26",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$27",["$L28"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"4Fl7QTMveZMOVseCGFgmd"}
29:I[305,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js","/_next/static/chunks/151pyee7vas-2.js","/_next/static/chunks/12r39sjxj5pr8.js"],"MermaidDiagram"]
2a:I[88125,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js","/_next/static/chunks/151pyee7vas-2.js","/_next/static/chunks/12r39sjxj5pr8.js"],"default"]
2b:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"OutletBoundary"]
2c:"$Sreact.suspense"
2f:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"ViewportBoundary"]
31:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
7:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"The Four Memory Tiers"}]
8:["$","$L29",null,{"chart":"\ngraph TB\n  subgraph Input[\"Agent Input\"]\n      I1[Observation]\n      I2[Conversation]\n      I3[Tool Result]\n  end\n\n  subgraph BEAM[\"BEAM Memory System\"]\n      WM[Working Memory\n      Short-term, up to 10K entries\n      <100ms access]\n      EM[Episodic Memory\n      Long-term experiences\n      Hybrid retrieval]\n      SM[Semantic Memory\n      Structured facts\n      Subject-predicate-object triples]\n      SP[Scratchpad\n      Temporary workspace\n      Up to 1K entries]\n  end\n\n  I1 -->|remember| WM\n  I2 -->|remember| WM\n  I3 -->|remember| WM\n  WM -->|sleep consolidation| EM\n  EM -->|recall| Agent\n\n  style WM fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#0284c7\n  style EM fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#d97706\n  style SM fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#16a34a\n  style SP fill:#faf5ff,stroke:#9333ea\n"}]
9:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Working Memory"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":"The agent's immediate context window. Holds recent observations, conversation history, and active tool results. Fastest access (<100ms), limited capacity (up to 10,000 entries), and subject to eviction via sleep consolidation."}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}]
c:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Latency"}],": Sub-100ms median"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Capacity"}],": Up to 10,000 entries (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX_ITEMS"}],", default 10,000)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"TTL"}],": 24 hours (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_TTL_HOURS"}],", default 24)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Persistence"}],": Survives process restarts via SQLite"]}],"\n"]}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Episodic Memory"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":"Long-term storage for experiences, conversations, and events. Organized chronologically with rich metadata. Uses hybrid retrieval combining vector similarity and full-text search."}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}]
10:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retention"}],": Permanent (until explicit deletion)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retrieval"}],": Hybrid (vector + FTS5) with fixed scoring weights"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Consolidation"}],": Promoted from Working Memory via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]]}],"\n"]}]
11:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Semantic Memory"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":["Structured knowledge stored as subject-predicate-object triples. Managed by the separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}]," class (not part of the main ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," class)."]}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}]
14:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Format"}],": Subject-predicate-object triples with confidence and validity timestamps"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Query"}],": Filter by subject, predicate, or object via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore.query()"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Access"}],": Separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}]," class or module-level ",["$","code",null,{"children":"add_triple()"}]," / ",["$","code",null,{"children":"query_triples()"}]," helpers"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Schema"}],": Flexible, no predefined ontology"]}],"\n"]}]
15:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Scratchpad"}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":"A temporary workspace for reasoning, planning, and intermediate computations. Analogous to human working memory's manipulation buffer."}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}]
18:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Capacity"}],": Up to 1,000 entries (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SP_MAX"}],", default 1,000)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Use case"}],": Chain-of-thought, planning, scratch calculations"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"API"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_write()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_read()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_clear()"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Lifetime"}],": Session-bound"]}],"\n"]}]
19:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Data Flow"}]
1a:["$","$L29",null,{"chart":"\nsequenceDiagram\n  participant Agent\n  participant WM as Working Memory\n  participant SP as Scratchpad\n  participant EM as Episodic Memory\n  participant SM as Semantic Memory (TripleStore)\n\n  Agent->>WM: remember(content)\n  WM->>WM: store + index\n  Agent->>SP: scratchpad_write(thought)\n  SP->>SP: store\n  Agent->>EM: recall(query)\n  EM->>Agent: return results\n  Agent->>SM: add_triple(s, p, o)\n  SM->>SM: store triple\n  Agent->>SM: query_triples(s, p, o)\n  SM->>Agent: return triples\n"}]
1b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Sleep Consolidation"}]
1c:["$","p",null,{"children":["Call ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.sleep()"}]," to run a consolidation cycle that:"]}]
1d:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Select"}]," Working Memory entries older than TTL/2 (12 hours by default)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Group"}]," candidates by source"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Summarize"}]," each group via LLM or AAAK text substitution"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promote"}]," summaries to Episodic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Evict"}]," the original Working Memory entries"]}],"\n"]}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"children":"Sleep is triggered explicitly — it does not run automatically on a timer."}]
1f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Design Philosophy"}]
20:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's architecture prioritizes:"}]
21:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Locality"}],": All data in SQLite — no network calls for retrieval"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Transparency"}],": Every operation is inspectable and debuggable"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Efficiency"}],": Sub-100ms retrieval for typical workloads"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Flexibility"}],": Works standalone or as a Hermes plugin"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Privacy"}],": No data leaves your machine by default"]}],"\n"]}]
22:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L2a",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Comparison with Vector-Only Stores"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Unlike pure vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate), Mnemosyne combines dense embeddings with structured storage, full-text search, and temporal relationships. This hybrid approach delivers more precise retrieval for agent use cases where exact facts matter as much as semantic similarity."}]}]]}]]}]}]
23:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/12r39sjxj5pr8.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]
24:["$","$L2b",null,{"children":["$","$2c",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@2d"}]}]
2e:[]

32:[["$","title","0",{"children":"BEAM Architecture — Memory Tier System Overview"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"description","content":"Overview of BEAM (Biological-inspired Episodic-Associative Memory), Mnemosyne's four-tier architecture: Working, Episodic, Semantic, and Scratchpad memory."}],["$","link","2",{"rel":"author","href":"https://github.com/axdsan"}],["$","meta","3",{"name":"author","content":"Abdias Moya"}],["$","meta","4",{"name":"keywords","content":"AI memory,agent memory,persistent memory,BEAM,Mnemosyne,SQLite,vector search,Hermes plugin"}],["$","meta","5",{"name":"robots","content":"index, follow"}],["$","link","6",{"rel":"canonical","href":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site"}],["$","meta","7",{"property":"og:title","content":"BEAM Architecture — Memory Tier System Overview"}],["$","meta","8",{"property":"og:description","content":"Overview of BEAM (Biological-inspired Episodic-Associative Memory), Mnemosyne's four-tier architecture: Working, Episodic, Semantic, and Scratchpad memory."}],["$","meta","9",{"property":"og:image","content":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/og-image.svg"}],["$","meta","10",{"name":"twitter:card","content":"summary_large_image"}],["$","meta","11",{"name":"twitter:title","content":"BEAM Architecture — Memory Tier System Overview"}],["$","meta","12",{"name":"twitter:description","content":"Overview of BEAM (Biological-inspired Episodic-Associative Memory), Mnemosyne's four-tier architecture: Working, Episodic, Semantic, and Scratchpad memory."}],["$","meta","13",{"name":"twitter:image","content":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/og-image.svg"}],["$","link","14",{"rel":"icon","href":"/favicon.ico?favicon.0x3dzn~oxb6tn.ico","sizes":"256x256","type":"image/x-icon"}],["$","$L34","15",{}]]
